_metadata.description: Beast Era character appearances — NA Beast Wars, Beast Machines, Beast Wars II, Beast Wars Neo TV shows, and toy-only

data.name: Optimus Primal (Beast Wars Cartoon)
data.description: Stocky blue and red robot with gorilla proportions and silver faceplate reminiscent of Optimus Prime. Beast mode is a large silverback gorilla with dark brown fur. Carries twin swords in robot mode

data.name: Optimus Primal (Transmetal)
data.description: Metallic blue and chrome robot with organic-looking gorilla beast mode featuring chrome skin and hover-board surfing capability. More angular robot mode with flight jets

data.name: Megatron (Beast Wars Cartoon)
data.description: Purple and green robot with T-rex head as right hand weapon. Beast mode is a purple Tyrannosaurus rex. Regal bearing with distinctive vocal delivery. Rubber duck bath accessory in some episodes

data.name: Megatron (Beast Wars Transmetal)
data.description: Metallic purple and chrome robot. Transmetal beast mode is a metallic T-rex with roller-skate wheels. More imposing robot mode with chrome accents

data.name: Megatron (Beast Wars Dragon)
data.description: Large red and gold dragon Transmetal 2 form. Organic-looking dragon beast mode with fire breath. Robot mode retains dragon wings and head as chest armor. Most powerful form in Beast Wars

data.name: Cheetor (Beast Wars Cartoon)
data.description: Sleek yellow and blue robot with cheetah spots and youthful design. Beast mode is a yellow cheetah with black spots. Agile and fast in both modes

data.name: Cheetor (Transmetal)
data.description: Chrome and green metallic robot. Transmetal beast mode is a chrome cheetah with jet thrusters. Third mode is a flight-capable hoverboard configuration

data.name: Rattrap (Beast Wars Cartoon)
data.description: Small tan and gray robot with rat-like features and wiry build. Beast mode is a brown rat. Carries a pistol. Sarcastic demeanor reflected in hunched posture

data.name: Rattrap (Transmetal)
data.description: Metallic chrome and red robot. Transmetal beast mode is a chrome rat with wheel-based vehicle mode. More armored appearance than original form

data.name: Rhinox (Beast Wars Cartoon)
data.description: Massive green and brown robot with heavy build reflecting rhinoceros alt mode. Beast mode is a large brown rhinoceros. Carries twin chain-guns of doom. Calm and intellectual despite imposing frame

data.name: Dinobot (Beast Wars Cartoon)
data.description: Tall brown and tan robot with raptor features including head crest and tail. Beast mode is a brown velociraptor. Carries a spinning sword and fires laser eye-beams. Noble warrior bearing

data.name: Tarantulas (Beast Wars Cartoon)
data.description: Dark purple and green robot with spider-like features and hunched posture. Beast mode is a large brown and purple tarantula. Sinister and cackling mad scientist appearance

data.name: Waspinator (Beast Wars Cartoon)
data.description: Green and yellow robot with wasp wings and compound eyes. Beast mode is a large green and yellow wasp. Perpetually damaged and rebuilt. Speaks in third person with buzzing speech pattern

data.name: Terrorsaur (Beast Wars Cartoon)
data.description: Red robot with pteranodon features and wings. Beast mode is a red pteranodon. Screechy voice and ambitious personality reminiscent of G1 Starscream

data.name: Scorponok (Beast Wars Cartoon)
data.description: Black and green robot with large scorpion claws. Beast mode is a large black and green scorpion with cyberbee launcher in tail. Loyal but dim-witted second-in-command

data.name: Blackarachnia (Beast Wars Cartoon)
data.description: Black and gold robot with sleek feminine design and spider leg appendages. Beast mode is a black widow spider with gold markings. Later gains Transmetal 2 form with more organic appearance

data.name: Tigatron (Beast Wars Cartoon)
data.description: White and blue robot with tiger stripes and noble bearing. Beast mode is a white Siberian tiger. Carries a quasar cannon. Nature-loving loner who patrols far from base

data.name: Airazor (Beast Wars Cartoon)
data.description: Brown and gold robot with falcon wings and sleek aerial design. Beast mode is a brown peregrine falcon. Carries wrist-mounted missiles. Born on prehistoric Earth from a stasis pod

data.name: Inferno (Beast Wars Cartoon)
data.description: Red and black robot with powerful build and fire ant features. Beast mode is a large red fire ant. Carries a flamethrower weapon. Ant programming makes him call Megatron 'my Queen' then 'the Royalty'

data.name: Silverbolt (Beast Wars Cartoon)
data.description: Gray and brown robot with wolf legs and eagle wings — a Fuzor hybrid. Beast mode combines wolf body with eagle wings and beak. Noble and chivalrous personality

data.name: Quickstrike (Beast Wars Cartoon)
data.description: Yellow and brown robot with scorpion tail and cobra head hand — a Fuzor hybrid. Beast mode combines cobra upper body with scorpion lower body. Aggressive Southern-accented brawler

data.name: Depth Charge (Beast Wars Cartoon)
data.description: Blue and silver Transmetal robot with manta ray features and fin-wings. Beast mode is a metallic manta ray. Large and imposing frame. Carries an energy weapon and shark-fin blade

data.name: Rampage (Beast Wars Cartoon)
data.description: Red and brown Transmetal robot with crab features and massive claws. Beast mode is a metallic king crab with tank treads. Hulking berserker with indestructible spark. Also has a tank mode

data.name: Tigerhawk (Beast Wars Cartoon)
data.description: Large white and blue robot with tiger and hawk features. Beast mode fuses tiger body with massive hawk wings. Extremely powerful — commands elemental forces. Created by the Vok

data.name: Dinobot II (Beast Wars Cartoon)
data.description: White, blue and red Transmetal 2 robot with organic-looking velociraptor features. More monstrous and feral than original Dinobot. Glowing red eyes. Beast mode has exposed metallic musculature

data.name: Optimal Optimus (Beast Wars Cartoon)
data.description: Massive blue, red and silver robot combining Primal and Prime design elements. Four modes: robot, gorilla, jet, and ground vehicle. Largest Maximal in Beast Wars. Created when Primal absorbed Prime's spark

data.name: Nightscream (Beast Machines Cartoon)
data.description: Slim purple and black techno-organic robot with bat wings and pointed ears. Beast mode is a techno-organic bat with membrane wings. Young and impulsive with angular features

data.name: Botanica (Beast Machines Cartoon)
data.description: Green and brown techno-organic robot with plant-like features including vine tendrils and flower elements. Beast mode is a techno-organic plant form. Tall and willowy design

data.name: Jetstorm (Beast Machines Cartoon)
data.description: Sleek blue and silver Vehicon with jet-based design and pointed helmet. Vehicle mode is a Cybertronian jet fighter. Acrobatic and cocky personality reflecting trapped Silverbolt's spark

data.name: Tankor (Beast Machines Cartoon)
data.description: Massive gray and red Vehicon with tank-based design and heavy armor plating. Vehicle mode is a Cybertronian tank. Hulking frame conceals Rhinox's trapped intelligence

data.name: Thrust (Beast Machines Cartoon)
data.description: Sleek black and yellow Vehicon with motorcycle-based design and aerodynamic helmet. Vehicle mode is a Cybertronian motorcycle. Fast and aggressive. Contains Waspinator's spark

data.name: Obsidian (Beast Machines Cartoon)
data.description: Dark green and bronze Vehicon with helicopter-based design and rotor blades. Vehicle mode is a Cybertronian attack helicopter. Distinguished military bearing and strategic mind

data.name: Strika (Beast Machines Cartoon)
data.description: Large dark purple and silver Vehicon with heavy assault vehicle design. Vehicle mode is a six-wheeled Cybertronian assault carrier. Powerful and intimidating. Partner of Obsidian

data.name: Optimus Primal (Beast Machines Cartoon)
data.description: Techno-organic gorilla reformatted form. Streamlined blue and silver robot with organic elements. Beast mode is a sleek techno-organic gorilla. More spiritual leader than warrior in this incarnation

data.name: Cheetor (Beast Machines Cartoon)
data.description: Techno-organic cheetah reformatted form. Sleek yellow and black robot with organic cheetah elements. More mature and assertive than Beast Wars incarnation. Eventually challenges Optimus for leadership

data.name: Rattrap (Beast Machines Cartoon)
data.description: Techno-organic rat reformatted form. Small brown and tan robot with organic rat features. Struggles most with transformation in early episodes. Same sarcastic personality

data.name: Blackarachnia (Beast Machines Cartoon)
data.description: Techno-organic spider reformatted form. Sleek black and gold robot with organic spider elements. Driven to rescue Silverbolt from his Jetstorm persona throughout the series

data.name: Megatron (Beast Machines Cartoon)
data.description: Giant floating head controlling all of Cybertron, later a massive red and black techno-organic dragon body. Seeks to purge all organic matter from Cybertron. Most powerful incarnation

data.name: Noble (Beast Machines Cartoon)
data.description: Techno-organic wolf with blue and silver coloring. Alternates between Noble (wolf) and Savage (dragon) forms. Non-speaking beast intelligence. Befriended by Nightscream

data.name: Diagnostic Drone (Beast Machines Cartoon)
data.description: Small floating spherical drone with mechanical tendrils and scanning equipment. Metallic gray and red. Used by Megatron for maintenance and diagnostic purposes

data.name: Magnaboss (Beast Wars Toy)
data.description: Combined warrior formed from three Maximal beast components. Tall yellow, blue and red combined robot. Toy-only character not appearing in the TV show

data.name: Ironhide (Beast Wars Toy)
data.description: Gray and blue robot that transforms into an elephant. Magnaboss component forming one leg. Stocky build with elephant trunk weapon

data.name: Prowl (Beast Wars Toy)
data.description: Yellow and brown robot that transforms into a lion. Magnaboss component forming one leg. Agile design with lion mane details

data.name: Silverbolt (Magnaboss Toy)
data.description: White and blue robot that transforms into an eagle. Magnaboss torso component. Winged design with eagle head chest

data.name: Tripredacus (Beast Wars Toy)
data.description: Combined warrior formed from three Predacon insect/crustacean components. Dark green and purple combined robot. Toy-only combiner

data.name: Cicadacon (Beast Wars Toy)
data.description: Dark green robot that transforms into a cicada. Tripredacus component. Insect-like design with translucent wings

data.name: Ram Horn (Beast Wars Toy)
data.description: Dark red and black robot that transforms into a beetle. Tripredacus component. Sturdy build with horn weapon

data.name: Sea Clamp (Beast Wars Toy)
data.description: Purple and green robot that transforms into a lobster. Tripredacus torso component. Large claws and crustacean details

data.name: Polar Claw (Beast Wars Toy)
data.description: White and blue robot that transforms into a polar bear. Large Mega class figure with bat companion. Powerful arctic warrior design

data.name: Wolfang (Beast Wars Toy)
data.description: Gray and brown robot that transforms into a wolf. Deluxe class figure with owl companion accessory. Lupine design with fangs and claws

data.name: Buzz Saw (Beast Wars Toy)
data.description: Brown and tan robot that transforms into a buzzard/vulture. Deluxe class figure. Bird of prey design with wing weapons

data.name: Razorbeast (Beast Wars Toy)
data.description: Brown and red robot that transforms into a wild boar. Basic class figure with tusks and compact design

data.name: Armordillo (Beast Wars Toy)
data.description: Gray and orange robot that transforms into an armadillo. Basic class figure. Armored shell design with rolling attack mode

data.name: Insecticon (Beast Wars Toy)
data.description: Green and purple robot that transforms into a beetle. Basic class figure. Insect-like design with mandibles

data.name: Snapper (Beast Wars Toy)
data.description: Green and brown robot that transforms into a snapping turtle. Basic class figure. Shell armor and biting jaw mechanism

data.name: Iguanus (Beast Wars Toy)
data.description: Green and brown robot that transforms into an iguana. Basic class figure. Reptilian design with tail weapon

data.name: Cybershark (Beast Wars Toy)
data.description: Blue and gray robot that transforms into a hammerhead shark. Deluxe class figure. Aquatic design with shark fin blade weapon

data.name: Manterror (Beast Wars Toy)
data.description: Green and purple robot that transforms into a praying mantis. Deluxe class figure. Insectoid design with scythe-arm weapons

data.name: B'Boom (Beast Wars Toy)
data.description: Brown and blue robot that transforms into a mandrill. Mega class figure with missile launcher backpack. Primate design with colorful mandrill face

data.name: Transquito (Beast Wars Toy)
data.description: Gray and green robot that transforms into a mosquito. Mega class figure. Insect design with proboscis weapon and translucent wings

data.name: Razorclaw (Beast Wars Toy)
data.description: Brown and tan robot that transforms into a velociraptor. Basic class figure. Raptor design with slashing claw weapons

data.name: Claw Jaw (Beast Wars Toy)
data.description: Blue and orange robot that transforms into a squid/crab. Basic class figure. Aquatic design with tentacle weapons

data.name: Bonecrusher (Beast Wars Toy)
data.description: Brown and gray robot that transforms into a bison. Deluxe class figure. Heavy build with horned head design

data.name: Grimlock (Beast Wars Toy)
data.description: Blue and silver robot that transforms into a velociraptor. Deluxe class figure. Raptor design with slashing weapons. Electronic light-up eyes

data.name: Lio Convoy (BW II Cartoon)
data.description: White and blue robot with lion-head chest armor and military-style design. Beast mode is a large white lion with gold mane accents. Wields the Lio Missile launcher and Lion Claw weapons in robot mode

data.name: Apache (BW II Cartoon)
data.description: Brown and tan robot with mandrill features. Beast mode is a large mandrill with colorful face markings. Stocky build reflecting his role as a dependable second-in-command

data.name: Bighorn (BW II Cartoon)
data.description: Black and red robot with bison features including prominent horns. Beast mode is a black bison with red mechanical parts. Large and bulky frame befitting his bruiser combat style

data.name: Tasmania Kid (BW II Cartoon)
data.description: Small brown and tan robot with Tasmanian devil features. Beast mode is a compact Tasmanian devil. Youthful and energetic appearance matching his reckless personality

data.name: Diver (BW II Cartoon)
data.description: Green robot with frog-like features and aquatic design. Beast mode is a large green frog with spring-loaded tongue mechanism. Compact build suited for amphibious operations

data.name: Scuba (BW II Cartoon)
data.description: Blue and purple robot with squid-like features. Beast mode is a blue squid with multiple tentacles. Sleek aquatic design with mysterious, scholarly demeanor

data.name: Lio Junior (BW II Cartoon)
data.description: Small white and gold robot with juvenile lion features. Beast mode is a young white lion smaller than Lio Convoy's. Youthful appearance with energy-based combat abilities and short-range flight

data.name: Skywarp (BW II Cartoon)
data.description: Brown and gold robot with eagle features including wing-like shoulder armor. Beast mode is a bald eagle with brown and white plumage. Distinguished, dignified bearing of an experienced teacher

data.name: Santon (BW II Cartoon)
data.description: Massive grey robot with elephant features including trunk-like appendages. Beast mode is a large African elephant. Enormous frame reflecting both his physical power and gentle pacifist nature

data.name: Magnaboss (BW II Cartoon)
data.description: Combined super robot formed from Lio Junior (chest and head), Skywarp (headdress, chest armor, back), and Santon (lower body, arms). Imposing combined warrior with lion, eagle, and elephant elements

data.name: Moon (BW II Cartoon)
data.description: Small rabbit-shaped android with a carefree, childish appearance. Transforms between rabbit and humanoid forms. Monitors Gaia from the Moon alongside Artemis. Has flight and invisibility capabilities

data.name: Artemis (BW II Cartoon)
data.description: Humanoid female android with a more mature appearance than her companion Moon. Monitors planet Gaia from the Moon. Provides episode framing and commentary

data.name: Galvatron (BW II Cartoon)
data.description: Imposing purple and gold robot with dragon-like features. Dragon mode is a colossal fire-breathing beast. Drill tank mode features spinning drill as Drill Destroyer attack. Triple Changer with regal, menacing presence

data.name: Megastorm (BW II Cartoon)
data.description: Green and grey robot with heavy military tank design. Tank mode features the oversized Mega-Cannon. Bulky, imposing frame that contrasts with his scheming, cowardly personality around his brother

data.name: Gigastorm (BW II Cartoon)
data.description: Massive mechanical Ceratosaurus dinosaur with base and flying fortress alternate modes. Much larger than his Megastorm form. Features the Gigascouter drone companion. Dinosaur mode has heavy mechanical augmentation

data.name: Starscream (BW II Cartoon)
data.description: Sleek red and white robot with fighter jet elements. Jet mode is a stylized military fighter. Vain and effeminate appearance with narcissistic bearing. Partners with BB for combined stealth operations

data.name: Hellscream (BW II Cartoon)
data.description: Cyborg Beast robot with prominent shark features. Beast mode is a mechanically-styled cybernetic shark with launchable Peeping Head drone and Gale Dagger weapon. More aggressive appearance than Starscream form

data.name: BB (BW II Cartoon)
data.description: Large black robot with stealth bomber wing elements. Primary mode is a B-2 Spirit stealth bomber. Also has a tank mode. Heavy-set frame bristling with missile armaments for carpet-bombing attacks

data.name: Max-B (BW II Cartoon)
data.description: Cyborg Beast robot with canine features. Beast mode is a flying cybernetic dog with mechanical augmentation. BB's upgraded form with enhanced combat capabilities but same limited intelligence

data.name: Dirge (BW II Cartoon)
data.description: Purple and grey robot with fighter jet elements. Jet mode resembles a Dassault Rafale. Part of the Combatron jet duo with Thrust. Serious demeanor as the straight man in their comedy partnership

data.name: Dirgegun (BW II Cartoon)
data.description: Cyborg Beast robot with bee features including wings and stinger. Beast mode is a mechanical cybernetic bee. Equipped with the Blast Leader ultrasonic weapon. Dirge's powered-up Angolmois Energy form

data.name: Thrust (BW II Cartoon)
data.description: Blue and grey robot with fighter jet elements. Jet mode resembles an F-22 Raptor. Part of the Combatron jet duo with Dirge. Comedic appearance matching his role as the funny man

data.name: Thrustor (BW II Cartoon)
data.description: Cyborg Beast robot with dinosaur features. Beast mode is a mechanical dinosaur (retooled Dinobot mold design). Thrust's powered-up Angolmois Energy form with Gash Sword blade weapon housed in chest

data.name: Autostinger (BW II Cartoon)
data.description: Brown and green robot with construction vehicle elements. Vehicle mode is a large dump truck. Leader of the Autorollers with a mercenary bearing

data.name: Autocrusher (BW II Cartoon)
data.description: Heavy-set robot with construction vehicle elements. Vehicle mode is a payloader with lifting shovel. Oldest Autoroller with a battle-worn, juggernaut-like frame

data.name: Autojetter (BW II Cartoon)
data.description: Sleek robot with fighter jet elements. Vehicle mode is an F/A-18 fighter jet with Jetter Rocket missiles. Youngest Autoroller with a brash, aggressive appearance

data.name: Autolauncher (BW II Cartoon)
data.description: Robot with armored personnel carrier elements. Vehicle mode resembles a Condor APC. Eager, forward-leaning posture matching his always-rushing personality

data.name: Halfshell (BW II Cartoon)
data.description: Green and brown robot with tortoise shell armor. Beast mode is a mechanical tortoise. Space pirate captain bearing with shrewd, calculating eyes. Forms the torso of God Neptune

data.name: Sea Phantom (BW II Cartoon)
data.description: Dark-colored robot with manta ray features including wing-like appendages. Beast mode is a mechanical manta ray. Stealthy aquatic design

data.name: Terrormander (BW II Cartoon)
data.description: Robot with salamander features and fire-based weaponry. Beast mode is a mechanical salamander. Fierce warrior design among the Space Pirate Seacons

data.name: Coelagon (BW II Cartoon)
data.description: Robot with coelacanth fish features. Beast mode is a mechanical coelacanth, an ancient deep-sea fish. Aquatic design suited for underwater operations

data.name: Scylla (BW II Cartoon)
data.description: Female robot with squid or octopus features. Beast mode is an aquatic cephalopod. Distinctive feminine design among the Space Pirate Seacons. Often seen abandoning God Neptune formation

data.name: God Neptune (BW II Cartoon)
data.description: Massive combined warrior formed from five Space Pirate Seacons. Wields the Neptune Sword. Aquatic-themed giant robot with tortoise, manta ray, salamander, coelacanth, and squid elements. Sometimes seen hopping on one leg when Scylla abandons formation

data.name: Majin Zarak (BW II Cartoon)
data.description: Enormous scorpion-like fortress resembling the classic Black Zarak design. Galvatron's ultimate weapon appearing in the final story arc. Contains vast Angolmois Energy reserves

data.name: Ikard (BW II Cartoon)
data.description: Robot with giant squid features. Beast mode is a large squid similar to cousin Scuba's form. Nerdy appearance with nasally voice characterization. Guest character who delivers the Tako Tank

data.name: Big Convoy (BW Neo Cartoon)
data.description: Gargantuan heavily armored Maximal warrior in robot mode with numerous built-in weapons and the signature Big Cannon. Beast mode is a large brown mammoth with prominent tusks and trunk. Imposing presence befitting a one-man army turned reluctant teacher

data.name: Longrack (BW Neo Cartoon)
data.description: Slender Maximal robot with giraffe-patterned armor and an extendable arm weapon. Beast mode is an organic giraffe with long neck and characteristic spotted pattern. Prim and proper appearance matching his uptight personality

data.name: Colada (BW Neo Cartoon)
data.description: Sleek Maximal robot in dark colors with cobra-themed armor. Beast mode is an organic cobra with hood and fangs. Carries a shockwave-creating whip and Hand Byuto blade weapon. Desert combat specialist appearance

data.name: Stampy (BW Neo Cartoon)
data.description: Small, cute Maximal robot with white rabbit-themed armor and large ear sensors. Beast mode is a white rabbit. Can assume a Scissor Mode with diamond-sharp blades. Youthful and non-threatening appearance matching his timid personality

data.name: Break (BW Neo Cartoon)
data.description: Stocky Maximal robot with black and white penguin-themed armor. Beast mode is an emperor penguin with articulated flippers and feet. Energetic posture reflecting his hot-blooded, gung-ho personality

data.name: Heinrad (BW Neo Cartoon)
data.description: Round, portly Maximal robot with a clock built into his torso, reflecting his time-manipulation powers. Beast mode is an organic tanuki (Japanese raccoon dog) with a rotund body. Relaxed, laid-back appearance

data.name: Mach Kick (BW Neo Cartoon)
data.description: Athletic Maximal robot with horse-themed armor in midnight purple-blue colors. Beast mode is a midnight-purple-blue organic horse with a rooted nylon-hair tail. Strong, agile build reflecting his warrior experience and free spirit

data.name: Rockbuster (BW Neo Cartoon)
data.description: Heavily armored Maximal robot with a large asymmetric crab claw arm. Beast mode is an organic fiddler crab with one oversized pincer. Rugged, battle-worn appearance befitting a lone wolf vigilante warrior

data.name: Randy (BW Neo Cartoon)
data.description: Burly Maximal robot with boar-themed armor featuring tusks on the shoulders. Beast mode is an organic wild boar with prominent tusks. Powerfully built, reflecting his aggressive and direct personality

data.name: Sharp Edge (BW Neo Cartoon)
data.description: Aquatic-themed Maximal robot with sawshark blade elements on the arms. Beast mode is an organic sawshark with a distinctive rostrum saw. Calm exterior belying explosive destructive potential

data.name: Magmatron (BW Neo Cartoon)
data.description: Imposing Predacon commander who combines three dinosaur forms into one massive warrior. Combined mode features Giganotosaurus body with Quetzalcoatlus wings and Elasmosaurus tail. Regal and powerful presence as aspiring Emperor of Destruction

data.name: Landsaurus (BW Neo Cartoon)
data.description: Magmatron's land-based component form. A large Giganotosaurus dinosaur with powerful jaws and thick legs. Forms the main torso and legs of the combined Magmatron

data.name: Skysaurus (BW Neo Cartoon)
data.description: Magmatron's aerial component form. A Quetzalcoatlus pterosaur with broad wings and long beak. Forms the wings and arms of the combined Magmatron

data.name: Seasaurus (BW Neo Cartoon)
data.description: Magmatron's aquatic component form. An Elasmosaurus plesiosaur with long neck and flippers. Forms the tail and back-mounted weapon of the combined Magmatron

data.name: Guiledart (BW Neo Cartoon)
data.description: Sturdy Predacon robot with Triceratops-themed armor featuring prominent horns on the head. Beast mode is a Triceratops with frill and three horns. Wields electricity-based Thunder Horn blasts and a Tail Shooter weapon

data.name: Saberback (BW Neo Cartoon)
data.description: Predacon robot with Stegosaurus plate-like armor panels along the back. Beast mode is a Stegosaurus with dorsal plates and tail spikes. Can bury underground in Claw Trap Mode to ambush enemies

data.name: Sling (BW Neo Cartoon)
data.description: Predacon robot with Dimetrodon-themed armor featuring a prominent back sail. Beast mode is a Dimetrodon with opening mouth and distinctive back fin. Wields a multi-use Tail Bunker that functions as whip, blade, and cannon. Has a third flower disguise mode

data.name: Dead End (BW Neo Cartoon)
data.description: Dark Predacon robot with spiral shell elements from his ammonite beast mode. Beast mode is an ancient ammonite with spiral shell and grasping tentacles. Tentacles separate to form the hand-held Dead Gun in robot mode. Also wields the Spiral Bomb

data.name: Hydra (BW Neo Cartoon)
data.description: Sleek Predacon robot with pteranodon-themed wing structures. Beast mode is a pteranodon-like flying creature with spring-loaded auto-transformation. The fastest Predacon alive. Armed with a Wing Shot gun

data.name: Crazybolt (BW Neo Cartoon)
data.description: Predacon robot with frilled lizard-themed armor featuring a prominent neck frill. Beast mode is a frilled lizard, designed to evoke the Jurassic Park Dilophosaurus. Neither particularly fast nor strong, with a cowardly demeanor

data.name: Archadis (BW Neo Cartoon)
data.description: Avian Predacon robot with Archaeopteryx-themed feathered armor and flight capability. Beast mode is an organic Archaeopteryx, the ancient proto-bird. Adept marksman with deadly projectile attacks. Arrogant bearing and snobbish demeanor

data.name: Unicron (BW Neo Cartoon)
data.description: Resurrected as an energy being by the Blentrons, assuming Galvatron's appearance. The cosmic devil and ultimate antagonist of Beast Wars Neo. Absorbs his Blentron servants to sustain himself in the final confrontation with Big Convoy

data.name: Latolata (BW Neo Cartoon)
data.description: Freakish Blentron with hybrid lionfish and hornet beast mode. De facto leader of Unicron's servants. Extraordinarily powerful, able to defeat Big Convoy or Magmatron with little effort. Can regenerate from nearly any damage

data.name: Elphaorpha (BW Neo Cartoon)
data.description: Massive Blentron with hybrid elephant and killer whale beast mode. Functions as the team's galactic transport. Devoted servant of Unicron with extraordinary power that can shrug off nearly any attack

data.name: Drancron (BW Neo Cartoon)
data.description: Sinister Blentron assassin with hybrid lizard and dragonfly beast mode. Capable of slicing opponents apart with lethal precision. Nearly invincible in combat. Devoted servant of Unicron

data.name: Great Convoy (BW Neo Cartoon)
data.description: Superior Maximal officer who oversees Big Convoy's mission and the overall Maximal command structure. Authority figure in the Beast Wars Neo storyline
